lessons.title: Introduction to HTTP and the http Module
lessons.description: Understand HTTP basics and Node's built-in http module.

lessons.title: Creating a Basic HTTP Server
lessons.description: Build your first web server that responds to requests.

lessons.title: Handling Requests and Responses
lessons.description: Work with request methods, URLs, and set response headers.

lessons.title: Serving Different Content Types
lessons.description: Respond with HTML, JSON, and other content types.

lessons.title: Routing and Request Handling Basics
lessons.description: Implement simple routing to handle different paths.
